title: Dolt: This Makes SQL Feel Like Git
summary: Dolt is a SQL database that applies Git-style workflows to structured data, enabling branches, commits, diffs, merges, and pull requests directly on database tables. It addresses data collaboration and version control challenges for ML datasets, test data, game configs, and production changes without relying on CSV files or spreadsheets.
